# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: web-app
    tier: frontend
    env: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
      tier: frontend
      env: production
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
        tier: frontend
        env: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: your-registry/your-web-app:v1.0.0 # Replace with your actual web app image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080 # Or whatever port your web app listens on
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: "1Gi"
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached-service
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    env: production
spec:
  replicas: 1 # For simplicity; for high availability, consider a Memcached operator or multiple instances with client-side distribution.
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
      env: production
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        env: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6.22 # Use a specific, stable version
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "50m"
            memory: "64Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    env: production
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    env: production
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
  type: ClusterIP # Expose Memcached within the cluster
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker-deployment
  labels:
    app: worker
    tier: backend
    env: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
      tier: backend
      env: production
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
        tier: backend
        env: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: your-registry/your-worker-app:v1.0.0 # Replace with your actual worker app image
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "150m"
            memory: "512Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "750m"
            memory: "2Gi"
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: memcached-service
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        # Add any other environment variables or commands your worker needs
        # command: ["python", "worker.py"]
        # args: ["--queue", "default"]
